value.repair_goal: PHASE58, PHASE59 and PHASE60 final closure path must be explicitly bound into canonical roadmap, almanac, atlas, master state, handoff and phase ledger.

items.purpose: Repair missing canonical final path. No new engine, runtime, memory, intelligence or authority.
Consolidate roadmap, almanac, atlas, handoff, master state and ledger for V1 closure readiness.
Read-only audit of Reader, Envelope, Bridge, Risk, Prosecutor, Memory, Fusion, Lifecycle, Intelligence Officer, Consumer, Panel, Readmodels, Governance and Authority locks.
Freeze V1. After this point no new engine, architecture, doctrine or scope; only critical bug fixes.
Final V1 closure, GitHub seal and handoff.

items.repair: Add PHASE56-PHASE60 closure path with short Kapsam / Amaç / Sonuç format.
Record PHASE55 finding and PHASE56 V1 Final Path Canonical Repair as closure history.
Add V1 closure chain: Readonly Kokpit -> Full Audit -> Release Candidate Freeze -> Final Seal.
Update current state with PHASE56 path and V1 target PHASE60.
Update next-chat continuation with closure mode and no-new-build rule.
Add PHASE55/56 closure-path ledger records if file exists.

items: PHASE56 states clearly that the gap is V1 Final Path Canonical Repair.
PHASE56 states clearly that the gap is not engine/risk/memory/fusion/runtime/authority.
PHASE57, PHASE58, PHASE59 and PHASE60 are explicitly defined.
PHASE59 freeze rule blocks new engine, architecture, doctrine and scope after release candidate.
No DB schema write, active panel write, runtime change, provider call, AI call, trade, wallet or signing is enabled.
